---
description: Last Updated March 2026
---

# ✨ Self Aligned NMOS

* 952 Transistors per Chip
* 94% Yield
* 1.26V Threshold Voltage
* 5 um gate length

<figure><img src="../../.gitbook/assets/bar1.png" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>

<figure><img src="../../.gitbook/assets/bar2.png" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>

<figure><img src="../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (1).png" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>

<figure><img src="../../.gitbook/assets/image (1) (1) (1) (1).png" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>

<figure><img src="../../.gitbook/assets/image (2) (1) (1).png" alt=""><figcaption></figcaption></figure>

Process in Fabublox:

{% embed url="https://www.fabublox.com/process-editor/f52fe668-594d-4a94-bfb1-b1e3ce845f38" %}

| Step #          | Step Name                    | Parameters                                                                                                                                       | Comments                                                                                                                                                                                                             | Layer Stacks                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| --------------- | ---------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
|                 |                              |                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Unnamed Section |                              |                                                                                                                                                  |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 0               | Substrate Stack              | <p>PolySi: 500 nm<br>SiO2: 20 nm<br>Si (lightly p doped): 525 µm</p>                                                                             |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 1               | Acetone + IPA Clean (N2 dry) | <p>Cleaning Agent: Acetone then IPA<br>Ultra-Sonication: false</p>                                                                               | Squirt with Acetone, then IPA, then dry the surface with the N2 gun.                                                                                                                                                 | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 2               | Spin-On Dopant               | <p>Spin-On Dopant Name: P504<br>Dopant Type: N<br>Spin Speed: 4000 rpm<br>Spin Time: 20 secs</p>                                                 | <p>P504 from Filmtronics<br>must use filtered syringe tips</p>                                                                                                                                                       | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 3               | Dopant Diffusion             | <p>Diffusion Time: 15 mins<br>Diffusion Temperature: 1100 °C<br>Environmental: false</p>                                                         | In tube furnace with fused quartz tube                                                                                                                                                                               | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 4               | Wet-Etch                     | <p>Etch Time: 10 mins<br>Etching Agent(s): 6:1 BOE<br>Etch Temperature: 25 °C</p>                                                                | <p>BOE is HF + Ammonium Fluoride<br><br>DI water rinse after etch</p>                                                                                                                                                | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 5               | Acetone + IPA Clean (N2 dry) | <p>Cleaning Agent: Acetone then IPA<br>Ultra-Sonication: false</p>                                                                               | Squirt with Acetone, then IPA, then dry the surface with the N2 gun.                                                                                                                                                 | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 6               | HMDS Vapor Prime             | <p>Deposited Monolayer: HMDS<br>Layer Thickness: 5 Å</p>                                                                                         | <p>Not Using an actual vapor primer.<br><br>Spin @ 3000 rpm for 20 s<br>bake at 100C for 20 s</p>                                                                                                                    | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 7               | Spin Resist                  | <p>Resist: AZ P4210<br>Resist Type: Positive<br>Spin Speed: 4000 rpm<br>Spin Time: 30 secs</p>                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 8               | Bake                         | <p>Bake Temperature: 100 °C<br>Bake Time: 90 secs</p>                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 9               | Stepper Lithography          |                                                                                                                                                  | Pattern 1 -Defining Gates                                                                                                                                                                                            | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 10              | Develop                      | <p>Developer: AZ 400K 3:1 (DI water : developer)<br>Develop Time: 30 secs<br>Develop Temperature: 25 °C</p>                                      | Develop time may vary, use current stable patterning process. Modulate exposure time and develop time as needed to achieve good pattern resolution                                                                   | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 11              | ICP-RIE                      | <p>Etch Time: 90 secs<br>Etch Gas Composition: SF6<br>Gas Flows and Ratios: 10 sccm<br>RF Power or Voltage: 100 Watts<br>Sidewall Angle: 0 °</p> |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 12              | Wet Strip Resist             | Stripping Agent(s): Acetone then IPA                                                                                                             | Squirt with acetone, then IPA, then dry with N2 gun                                                                                                                                                                  | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 13              | Plasma Descum                | <p>Gas composition: O2 10 SCCM<br>RF Power: 100 Watts<br>Time: 2400 secs</p>                                                                     | Alternatively, a shorter clean can be done before resist strip.                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 14              | Wet-Etch                     | <p>Etch Depth: 20 nm<br>Etch Time: 20 secs<br>Etch Rate: 80 nm/s<br>Etching Agent(s): 6:1 BOE (HF)</p>                                           | <p>BOE is HF + Ammonium Fluoride<br><br>DI water rinse after etch</p>                                                                                                                                                | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 15              | Spin-On Dopant               | <p>Spin-On Dopant Name: P504<br>Dopant Type: N+<br>Spin Speed: 4000 rpm<br>Spin Time: 20 secs</p>                                                | <p>P504 from Filmtronics<br>must use filtered syringe tips<br></p>                                                                                                                                                   | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 16              | Bake                         | <p>Bake Temperature: 200 °C<br>Bake Time: 10 mins</p>                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 17              | HMDS Vapor Prime             | <p>Deposited Monolayer: HMDS<br>Layer Thickness: 5 Å</p>                                                                                         | <p>Not Using an actual vapor primer.<br><br>Spin @ 3000 rpm for 20 s<br>bake at 100C for 20 s</p>                                                                                                                    | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| 18              | Spin Resist                  | <p>Resist: AZ P4210<br>Resist Type: Positive<br>Spin Speed: 4000 rpm<br>Spin Time: 30 secs</p>                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 19              | Bake                         | <p>Bake Temperature: 100 °C<br>Bake Time: 90 secs</p>                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| 20              | Stepper Lithography          | Exposure time: 8 secs                                                                                                                            | Pattern 2 N well (source/drain) region defining pattern. Note, this may overlap with the gate area and further effect PolySi dopant concentration.                                                                   | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 21              | Develop                      | <p>Developer: AZ 400K 3:1 (DI water : developer)<br>Develop Time: 60 secs<br>Develop Temperature: 25 °C</p>                                      | Develop time may vary, use current stable patterning process. Modulate exposure time and develop time as needed to achieve good pattern resolution.                                                                  | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 22              | Wet-Etch                     | <p>Etch Time: 10 secs<br>Etching Agent(s): BOE 6:1 (HF)</p>                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 23              | Wet Strip Resist             | Stripping Agent(s): Acetone then IPA                                                                                                             | Squirt with acetone, then IPA, then dry with N2 gun                                                                                                                                                                  | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 24              | Dopant Diffusion             | <p>Diffusion Time: 30 mins<br>Diffusion Temperature: 1100 °C<br>Environmental: false</p>                                                         |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (19).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 25              | Wet-Etch                     | <p>Etch Time: 10 mins<br>Etching Agent(s): 6:1 BOE (HF)</p>                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                                                                                             |
| 26              | Spin-Coat                    | <p>Material: 700B<br>Spin Speed: 4000 rpm<br>Spin Time: 20 secs</p>                                                                              | 700B from filmtronics                                                                                                                                                                                                | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                     |
| 27              | Bake                         | <p>Bake Temperature: 200 °C<br>Bake Time: 10 mins</p>                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                     |
| 28              | Acetone + IPA Clean (N2 dry) | <p>Cleaning Agent: Acetone then IPA<br>Ultra-Sonication: false</p>                                                                               | Squirt with Acetone, then IPA, then dry the surface with the N2 gun.                                                                                                                                                 | ![](data:image/png;base64,)                                     |
| 29              | HMDS Vapor Prime             | <p>Deposited Monolayer: HMDS<br>Layer Thickness: 5 Å</p>                                                                                         | <p>Not Using an actual vapor primer.<br><br>Spin @ 3000 rpm for 20 s<br>bake at 100C for 20 s</p>                                                                                                                    | ![](data:image/png;base64,) |
| 30              | Spin Resist                  | <p>Resist: AZ P4210<br>Resist Type: Positive<br>Spin Speed: 4000 rpm<br>Spin Time: 30 secs</p>                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (20).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 31              | Bake                         | <p>Bake Temperature: 100 °C<br>Bake Time: 90 secs</p>                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (21).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 32              | Stepper Lithography          | Exposure time: 8 secs                                                                                                                            | Pattern 3 - Defining Al contact areas                                                                                                                                                                                | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (22).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 33              | Develop                      | <p>Developer: AZ 400K 3:1 (DI water : developer)<br>Develop Time: 60 secs<br>Develop Temperature: 25 °C</p>                                      | Develop time may vary, use current stable patterning process. Modulate exposure time and develop time as needed to achieve good pattern resolution.                                                                  | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (23).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 34              | Wet-Etch                     | <p>Etch Time: 20 secs<br>Etching Agent(s): 6:1 BOE (HF)</p>                                                                                      |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (24).png>) | 35              | Wet Strip Resist             | Stripping Agent(s): Acetone then IPA                                                                                                             | Squirt with acetone, then IPA, then dry with N2 gun                                                                                                                                                                  | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (25).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 36              | Thermal Evaporation          | Film thickness: 500 nm                                                                                                                           | Alternatively sputtering can be used depending on available lab tooling.                                                                                                                                             | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (26).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 37              | Acetone + IPA Clean (N2 dry) | <p>Cleaning Agent: Acetone then IPA<br>Ultra-Sonication: false</p>                                                                               | Squirt with Acetone, then IPA, then dry the surface with the N2 gun.                                                                                                                                                 | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (27).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 38              | Spin Resist                  | <p>Resist: AZ P4210<br>Resist Type: Positive<br>Spin Speed: 4000 rpm<br>Spin Time: 30 secs</p>                                                   |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (28).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| 39              | Bake                         | <p>Bake Temperature: 100 °C<br>Bake Time: 90 secs</p>                                                                                            |                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (29).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| 40              | Stepper Lithography          |                                                                                                                                                  | Pattern 4 - Interconnect and contact pad definition                                                                                                                                                                  | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (30).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 41              | Develop                      | <p>Developer: AZ 400K 3:1 (DI water : developer)<br>Develop Time: 60 secs<br>Develop Temperature: 25 °C</p>                                      | Develop time may vary, use current stable patterning process. Modulate exposure time and develop time as needed to achieve good pattern resolution.                                                                  | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (31).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 42              | Wet-Etch                     | <p>Etch Time: 5 mins<br>Etching Agent(s): Type A Al Etchant<br>Etch Temperature: 40 °C<br>New Field 1: stir speed 150 rpm</p>                    | <p>Heat Etch up for 5-10 minutes before begining. Di water rinse after etch.<br><br>Etch rate to be around 90nm/minute with Type A Al etchant for the Evaporatied Al, and based off the evaporator QCM readings.</p> | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (32).png>)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 43              | Wet Strip Resist             | Stripping Agent(s): Acetone then IPA                                                                                                             | Squirt with acetone, then IPA, then dry with N2 gun                                                                                                                                                                  | ![](<../../.gitbook/assets/unknown (33).png>)
